name: migros-mcp
description: Search Migros products and (optionally) manage your basket, addresses, and order history through Claude.

email.title: Migros Email (optional)
email.description: Your migros.ch login email. Leave blank to use anonymous (read-only) tools only.

password.title: Migros Password (optional)
password.description: Your migros.ch password. Leave blank to skip authenticated tools.

totp_secret.title: Migros TOTP Secret (optional)
totp_secret.description: The static base32 seed (~32 characters of A-Z2-7) you got when setting up your authenticator app. NOT the rotating 6-digit code. From your password manager's 'view OTP secret' option, or by re-enrolling a new authenticator and revealing the seed text. Leave blank if you have no 2FA.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search Migros products by name or keyword

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Get full product info: nutrition, ingredients, allergens, price

tools.name: get_stock
tools.description: Check product availability at a specific store

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: List all product categories

tools.name: search_stores
tools.description: Find Migros stores by location with hours

tools.name: get_promotions
tools.description: Browse current promotions and deals

tools.name: search_recipes
tools.description: Search Migusto recipes by query and/or ingredients (de/fr/it)

tools.name: get_recipe_details
tools.description: Full recipe by slug: ingredients, instructions, photos

tools.name: get_recipe_products
tools.description: Get Migros product UIDs for a recipe — feed directly to add_to_basket

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: (Auth) Logged-in customer's profile

tools.name: get_addresses
tools.description: (Auth) Saved delivery and billing addresses

tools.name: get_basket
tools.description: (Auth) Items currently in the user's basket

tools.name: add_to_basket
tools.description: (Auth) Add a product to the basket

tools.name: update_basket_quantity
tools.description: (Auth) Set an item's exact quantity (0 to remove)

tools.name: remove_from_basket
tools.description: (Auth) Remove an item from the basket

tools.name: get_orders
tools.description: (Auth) List the user's online orders, paginated

tools.name: get_order_details
tools.description: (Auth) Full details of a single order by id

tools.name: get_checkout_link
tools.description: (Auth) Hand off to the user's browser to complete checkout

tools.name: get_cumulus_status
tools.description: (Auth) Cumulus loyalty card status: points, level, cardholder

tools.name: get_in_store_receipts
tools.description: (Auth) List in-store Migros receipts (Kassenbons) over a date range

tools.name: get_receipt_details
tools.description: (Auth) URL to view a single in-store receipt in the browser

tools.name: get_cumulus_coupons
tools.description: (Auth) Active personalized Cumulus coupons
